name: Quick Turkey Appetizers (Gtc)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Deli smoked turkey, sliced into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tortillas on two 12x14 inch baking sheets.
2. Lightly brush both sides of the tortillas with oil.
3. Bake tortillas at 400°F for 3 minutes, then remove from oven.
4. Spread salsa evenly over the center of each tortilla, leaving a 1/2-inch margin from the edge.
5. Sprinkle turkey, tomato, cilantro, olives, red pepper flakes, and cheese evenly over the salsa on each tortilla.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes longer or until the cheese melts.
7. To serve, slice the tortillas into eighths.
Nutritional Analysis per serving/item: Calories 55 Protein 4 gm Fat 2 gm Carbohydrate 6 gm Sodium 163 mg Cholesterol 6 mg
